description:
happy birthday my prapti. recently i've been thinking about all the memories that have brought us here. i kept looking through my camera roll to reminisce, an activity that i grew more fond of after doing it with you. i wanted to compile my favorite memories with you from the past year. so i know this timeline may not have contained all of your 22 memories; i used the photos i had that made me smile. this whole project makes me want to fill up our map with many more hearts in different places. i would be so happy if we can do that this year and for many more years. i still haven't gotten to celebrate with you so that will be the next heart i put on this map.
- ash
